text:
kuriyama    2008-02-25 22:36:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    converters/p5-JSON   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Upgrade to 1.15 (1.x final version).
  - Use BUILD_DEPENDS= ${RUN_DEPENDS} to prevent from unnecessary
    dependency into RUN_DEPENDS.
  - Use @dirrmtry, because other module can use JSON::*.
  
  PR:             ports/120762
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.10      +4 -4      ports/converters/p5-JSON/Makefile

  1.7       +4 -4      ports/converters/p5-JSON/pkg-plist
